parameters.content:
## Send a thank-you email with an invoice for every Sellf purchase

### How it works
[Sellf](https://github.com/jurczykpawel/sellf) - a self-hosted checkout platform for digital products - sends a signed `purchase.completed` webhook for every paid order. This workflow verifies the `X-Sellf-Signature` HMAC header and splits buyers in two: B2B buyers (invoice requested + NIP) first get a Fakturownia VAT invoice created, then the thank-you email; consumers get the thank-you email right away. One workflow covers the whole post-purchase moment: confirmation, order summary and paperwork.

### Setup
1. In Sellf admin open **Settings → Webhooks**, add an endpoint with this workflow's Production URL and copy the signing secret.
2. In Fakturownia grab your account name (subdomain) and API token.
3. Fill in **Configuration (EDIT ME)**: webhook secret, Fakturownia account + token, VAT rate and your sender address.
4. Connect SMTP credentials on **Send Thank-you Email** and make the copy yours.
5. See the red note on **Verify Signature** for one required n8n environment setting, then activate.

### Customization tips
Using iFirma or wFirma instead? Grab the matching Sellf template and splice its build/send pair in place of the Fakturownia node. Sellf delivers the product itself - this email is your personal thank-you on top, not the delivery.

## Receive & Verify
Accepts the Sellf webhook and checks its HMAC signature before trusting the payload.

## Acknowledge & Extract
Responds immediately, then filters for completed purchases that requested an invoice with a NIP.

## Invoice & Thank-you
B2B buyers get the invoice created first; everyone gets the thank-you email.

## Node setting required
This Code node needs `require('crypto')`. Self-hosted n8n: set `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto` in the n8n environment, then restart.

nodes.name: Sellf Webhook
nodes.notes: Paste this node's Production URL into Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks -> Add endpoint.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)
nodes.notes: webhookSecret from Sellf admin -> Settings -> Webhooks. fakturowniaAccount = your panel subdomain.

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge before processing - Sellf retries deliveries that don't get a 2xx.

nodes.name: Is Purchase?
nodes.notes: Only purchase.completed flows through - other events (and Sellf's test deliveries) are dropped.

nodes.name: Needs Invoice?
nodes.notes: B2B buyers (invoice + NIP) go through invoicing first; consumers skip straight to the email.

nodes.name: Create Fakturownia Invoice
nodes.notes: The api_token travels in the body - Fakturownia's scheme. neverError: failures land in Log Error instead of killing the run.

nodes.name: Send Thank-you Email

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Thank you for your purchase: ' + $('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.productName }}
parameters.html:
={{ '

Thank you for your purchase!

Hi' + ($('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.firstName ? ' ' + $('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.firstName : '') + ',

Your purchase of ' + $('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.productName + ' is confirmed (' + $('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.amount + ' ' + $('Extract Purchase Data').item.json.currency + ').

You will find the product in your Sellf account. If you requested an invoice, it is on its way separately.

Enjoy!

' }}

nodes.notes: Connect SMTP credentials and rewrite the copy in your voice. Sellf handles product delivery - this is the personal touch.
